overall.description: A cinematic nighttime sequence from a video game (Red Dead Redemption 2) showing a historic New Orleans-style town. The camera follows a character walking down wet cobblestone streets lit by gas lamps, then smoothly rises into an aerial view revealing the town layout, a central plaza with a clock tower, and finally a cemetery with above-ground tombs under a full moon.

segments.scene_description: The scene opens at ground level on a wet cobblestone street at night, following a character walking away from the camera. Warm gas lamps illuminate the historic brick buildings with balconies on either side, while trees create a canopy overhead.

events.description: camera begins smooth ascent from ground level to aerial perspective

agents.ego_description: rising above the street while maintaining forward trajectory, revealing the character and carriage below

network of black electrical wires crossing above the street

segments.scene_description: The camera smoothly rises from ground level into an aerial view, revealing the horse-drawn carriage parked on the street below. Utility poles and overhead wires become visible as the perspective shifts upward, with the historic buildings now seen from above.

scene_state.functional_zone: aerial view of historic town grid

agents.ego_description: flying forward at elevation over the town, observing the grid of streets and historic architecture

entered.detail: intersecting pattern of cobblestone streets forming the town layout

segments.scene_description: Now at high altitude, the camera moves forward over the historic town, revealing the grid pattern of cobblestone streets below. The gas lamps create pools of warm light along the thoroughfare, while the buildings appear as organized blocks of historic architecture.

scene_state.functional_zone: town square with clock tower transitioning to cemetery

full moon becomes visible above the cemetery, adding cool backlight to the scene

agents.ego_description: flying over the town square and approaching the cemetery area, observing the transition from urban to burial grounds

circular town square with benches and planted trees
above-ground burial tombs with white stone facades typical of New Orleans style
bright full moon visible in the night sky above the cemetery

segments.scene_description: The camera approaches a prominent town square featuring a tall clock tower and circular plaza. As it continues forward, the scene transitions to reveal a historic cemetery with above-ground tombs, while a bright full moon rises into view above the burial grounds.

scene_state.functional_zone: historic cemetery with above-ground tombs under full moon

agents.ego_description: flying over the cemetery observing the arrangement of tombs and monuments in the moonlight

entered.detail: low brick wall marking the boundary of the cemetery grounds
dark silhouette of trees surrounding the cemetery perimeter

segments.scene_description: The final segment shows the camera flying over the historic cemetery, with rows of above-ground tombs and mausoleums visible in the moonlight. The full moon dominates the sky overhead, casting a cool silvery light over the burial grounds while the town recedes into the background.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that begins at street level in a historic town and ascends into a moonlit aerial view of a cemetery. It begins on a wet cobblestone street, following a character walking away from the camera beneath a canopy of trees and warm gas lamps. As the camera smoothly rises, the perspective shifts upward to reveal horse-drawn carriages and utility wires before expanding into a high-altitude view of the town's organized grid of brick buildings. The scene then glides forward over a central plaza featuring a prominent clock tower, transitioning from the warm glow of the thoroughfares toward a historic cemetery. Finally, the camera flies over rows of above-ground tombs and mausoleums as a bright full moon rises to cast a cool silvery light over the burial grounds.
